---
title: "Welcome to Quartostone"
date: today
---

# Welcome to your Quartostone workspace

This is your first page. Edit it in **Visual mode** (WYSIWYG) or **Source mode** (raw `.qmd`).

## What you can do

-   **Write** — rich text with headings, lists, callouts, and code blocks
-   **Execute code** — Python, R, Julia, and Observable JS via Quarto
-   **Version control** — every save can auto-commit to Git
-   **Publish** — render your workspace as a Quarto website with one command

## Getting started

Create new pages from the sidebar. Use `/` in Visual mode to insert blocks.

```{python}
#| eval: false
print("Hello from Quartostone!")
```

::: callout-tip
## Tip

Switch between **Visual** and **Source** mode using the toggle in the toolbar.
:::
